query.query_string: Cyclosporine AND granulomatous disease, chronic, autosomal recessive

data.query: Cyclosporine AND granulomatous disease, chronic, autosomal recessive

results.title: Excellent survival after sibling or unrelated donor stem cell transplantation for chronic granulomatous disease.
results.abstract: Matched related donor (MRD) hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (HSCT) is a successful treatment for chronic granulomatous disease (CGD), but the safety and efficacy of HSCT from unrelated donors is less certain.
results.journal: The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology
